description: Clunky block heels with patent leather and elasticated straps from catwalk that can instantly glam up daytime wear or party girl ensembles. Wear this with tonal accessories, skinny jeans and an understated top with a slouchy shrug. Heel: 3.5"UpperForefoot strap with elastic detail for ease of wearingCriss crossing midfoot straps that loop around the anklePadded and cushioned footbed with a branded heel patchUpper stitched to the outsole for durabilityOutsoleChunky heel with textured grooves on the fore foot and heelSandal careWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
